Accessibility at Matthew House Ottawa

Matthew House Ottawa is committed to providing an accessible and inclusive environment for all individuals. We strive to meet the needs of people with disabilities in a timely manner and comply with the requirements of the Accessibility for Ontarians with Disabilities Act, 2005 (AODA).

Our Accessibility Compliance Report has been filed with the Government of Ontario and is available below:

Accessibility Compliance Report


If you require this information in an alternate format or need accommodation when accessing our services, please contact us at humanresources@matthewhouseottawa.org
